summary: Iteration 3 UPI deep-link + verification flow fully working. Backend: 11/11 new pytest tests pass in /app/backend/tests/test_upi_verify_iter3.py, plus regression 33/33 iteration-2 tests still green (44/44 total). Covered: GET /api/upi/info returns vpa=satrwa@icici, payee_name='Sri Anjaneya Township RWA', upi_url starting with 'upi://pay?pa=satrwa@icici' containing pa/pn/am/cu=INR/tn params, plus gpay_url(tez://), phonepe_url(phonepe://), paytm_url(paytmmp://) each with same params; GET /api/upi/qr returns image/png with valid PNG magic bytes and non-trivial size; POST /api/maintenance/pay + /api/amenity/gym + /api/amenity/pool accept and persist upi_ref_no field and set verified=false initially (validated via GET /api/receipt/{no}); POST /api/admin/verify-payment toggles verified flag (correct pin -> 200, wrong pin -> 401, missing receipt -> 404), verified_at stamped when true; PDF endpoint returns different bytes when verified toggles (PAID vs PENDING stamp); Excel export /api/admin/export contains 'verified' and 'upi_ref_no' columns in both Maintenance and Amenities sheets. Frontend E2E (mobile 390x844): registered A-736034 with current month, dues 1×₹2000, opened pay screen — verified all 7 testIDs (upi-amount, pay-gpay, pay-phonepe, pay-paytm, pay-any, upi-qr-image with naturalWidth=450, copy-vpa-btn showing 'satrwa@icici'), 'Payable to Sri Anjaneya Township RWA' visible, big amount ₹2,000 rendered; tapped pay-any -> UI transitioned to confirm step (ref-no-input, i-have-paid-btn, not-yet-btn all visible); entered ref '501234567890' and tapped i-have-paid-btn -> navigated to /receipt showing OP033 with 'Awaiting Verification' heading, gold PENDING stamp, and 'UPI Ref No 501234567890' row. Navigated to /admin, entered PIN 1234, saw verify-OP033 button in Today tab, tapped it -> chip flipped from PENDING to VERIFIED. Re-opened receipt -> now shows 'Payment Verified' with green PAID stamp. All specified iteration-3 features working end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~740 lines — crossed the 700-line recommended split threshold. Consider modularizing into routes/services/pdf/upi modules in a future refactor.
build_upi_url uses `&mc=0000` — a placeholder merchant category; harmless for P2P personal VPA but worth revisiting if a real MCC is assigned.
gpay_url/phonepe_url/paytm_url are constructed via string surgery on upi_url — works but fragile; consider building each URL from a shared params dict.
PDF regeneration on every download is fine for A5 receipts but consider a background executor if load grows (already noted in iter-2).
verified_at is set to None when un-verifying — good; but there is no audit history of who/when verified. Could add an admin_actions log collection later.
/api/admin/verify-payment requires the plain PIN in body — same trust model as other admin endpoints; fine for MVP but flag for later JWT/admin-token upgrade.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests registered flat A/U<runtag> (start_month=current) then made maintenance + gym + pool payments each with distinct upi_ref_no, exercised admin verify/undo. Frontend E2E registered flat A-736034 (owner TestUPI3) and created receipt OP033 for ₹2,000 which was verified via admin panel. No production data modified; test flats prefixed with TEST_/U<hex> for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 fully green. New endpoints: GET /api/upi/info, GET /api/upi/qr, POST /api/admin/verify-payment. New testIDs on Pay screen: upi-amount, pay-gpay, pay-phonepe, pay-paytm, pay-any, upi-qr-image, copy-vpa-btn, ref-no-input, not-yet-btn, i-have-paid-btn. New testID in Admin PaymentRow: verify-{receipt_no}. Receipt/Pay flow: pay-any triggers Linking.openURL (which fails on web) but the catch/finally still calls setStep('confirm') so the confirm UI reliably renders in web preview. On the web preview an Alert dialog may pop up when the upi:// scheme fails — the test used page.on('dialog', ...) to dismiss it. Receipt series was at OP033 after this run. Container date at test time was 2026-07-01. If retested later, ensure test flats with prefix 'TEST_' or 'U<hex>' are cleaned up periodically.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All iteration-3 acceptance criteria verified end-to-end (backend + frontend + integration + admin verification loop).
